positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a cosmic mountain range against a swirling nebulae backdrop. The mountain peaks are depicted with clean, angular silhouettes in deep indigo and emerald green, sharply contrasted against the softer, luminous gradient of lavender and pale gold background. Incorporate scattered constellations rendered as geometric points of light. Style: Highly stylized, vector-art quality, flat design mixed with glowing cosmic elements. Composition: Central focus, highly symmetrical, suitable for t-shirt printing. Lighting: Strong rim lighting on the peaks, ethereal glow overall. Aspect Ratio: Square, high contrast.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, noise, grain, sketch, low resolution, dirty, messy, photorealism
